verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The promise of the Lord is now at hand, And in the love of God, o, there she stands; That Super-race the Lord has spoken to, "Thus saith the Lord, she's in plain view."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our beloved prophet cried to see our day, When the beloved Bride of God will show the way, Today, here stands the Bride becoming Christ; Passing every Bridal test into perfect rest.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Elisha surely saw Elijah go, And he got a double part of grace to know; So nothing will stand in God's Bride's way, For she saw Elijah go along the way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The mystery is God in our flesh, And veiled behind our skins, that is the test; Stumbling the world with its simpleness, For we now see that we are the Messiahettes.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The enemy is running on every hand, All heaven is amazed, God's mystery grand; Those seven thunders saying "Christ is revealed," Now Jesus Christ and Bride united stand.
